meta.name: deepseek-acp
meta.description: DeepSeek tier: extends base-acp only. Deliberately does NOT include claude_code_linux/claude_cache_linux groups or any $HOME/.claude access - this profile is used for lower-trust routing and must never see Claude Code's session state or .credentials.json. Credential is injected via nono's phantom-token proxy from ANTHROPIC_DEEPSEEK_KEY, which is itself populated at chezmoi-apply time from Bitwarden Secrets Manager - never committed in plaintext.
